* **IMMZD5DTJEContraindicationsLogic**

## Library: IMMZD5DTJEContraindicationsLogic 

| | |
| :--- | :--- |
| *Official URL*:http://smart.who.int/immunizations/Library/IMMZD5DTJEContraindicationsLogic | *Version*:0.2.0 |
| Draft as of 2026-03-24 | *Computable Name*:IMMZD5DTJEContraindicationsLogic |

 
This library defines decision support logic for the IMMZ.D5.DT.JE contraindications decision table in the Immunization CPG
